ValidationRule.description: "The selection of the 'Programmée à poser' value must be blocked if there is no 'Replacement' type Work Order with a status of 'Programmé' or 'Confirmé' associated with the Case linked to the Opportunity. 22/04 Deactivated after several bugs MCOSF-6465
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Veuillez programmer ou confirmer une intervention de remplacement pour modifier le sous-statut.
